rationale: Sprint LR.1 — establish real-state baseline pre-public-launch. Combines deterministic pipeline-component validation (no LLM cost) with a real-LLM smoke check against OpenRouter to verify the inference seam still works. Full 10-eval canonical suite (eval-001..eval-010) remains manual per evals/runner.md §2 — automated runner deferred to evals/runner.md §3.

capability_inventory.delta_explanation: describe(...) blocks not counted; commented-out tests counted; describe-only files excluded; ~4% under-report acceptable for discovery surface

diagnostic.likely_cause: Key may be a provisioning key (used to create inference keys via API) rather than an inference key, OR account credits exhausted, OR key has scoping that excludes chat completions.
operator_recovery_path: 2. Verify the key shown is the INFERENCE key (not provisioning)
3. If provisioning, create a fresh inference key with proper scope + credit allocation
5. Re-run: node bin/steward/dry-run.cjs --slug=cortex-x --json (after restoring cortex/recommendations.md with actionable items)
6. Re-run baseline: node -e '<script from this file>' to capture full eval
diagnostic.alternative_engine: Run with claude-cli engine instead: STEWARD_ENGINE=claude-cli (uses Anthropic Max subscription via CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN, $0/run net cost since subscription is flat)

manual_full_eval_status.operator_action_required: Per evals/runner.md §2 — set up 10 sandbox dirs (eval-001 through eval-010), open fresh Claude Code session per eval, paste prompt, capture output, score against rubric. Estimated cost $10-15, time ~2 hours.
manual_full_eval_status.post_video_target: Run full manual eval suite once per month against tagged release

ready_for_public_launch.verdict: READY for install demo + first-sprint walk-through video
asterisks: Sprint 2.2 worktree supervisor not yet shipped — video pitch should NOT promise parallel-multi-agent throughput
Sprint 2.3 mutation testing R1-only — measure-only mode for 2 weeks before ratcheting (operator OK pending)
Real-LLM eval baseline awaits operator OpenRouter inference-key verification (pipeline architecture is verified end-to-end via 2339 tests)
differentiators_safe_to_pitch: Sprint 2.18 read-coverage proof (read_set acceptance-criterion kind — no other framework ships this)
Apache 2.0 license + Steward autonomous nightly runtime + 16-kind action palette
settings.json never auto-overwritten (preserves user's existing hooks)
